name: Mexican Mafia
description: The Mexican Mafia (La eMe) is a predominantly Mexican-American prison gang founded in 1957 by Luis 'Huero Buff' Flores at Deuel Vocational Institution in Tracy, California. Despite its name, it has no origins in Mexico. With 250-300 'made' members and 50,000+ loyal street soldiers, it is considered 'among the most powerful, dangerous and feared criminal organizations in the world' by the US Government. La eMe controls all Sureño street gangs in Southern California through a tribute/'tax' system — including MS-13 and 18th Street. Allied with the Aryan Brotherhood, Sinaloa Cartel, and Mongols MC. The 'Shoe War' of 1968 at San Quentin established Nuestra Familia as their primary rival. Their symbol is a black hand (referencing early 20th century Black Hand extortion). Blood-in, blood-out membership policy. In 1992, Joe 'Pegleg' Morgan's no-drive-by edict stopped all drive-by shootings in East LA for 5 months — demonstrating their total control.
